rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ARNOLD S GRIDLEY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney'S Fees
rulings.Rulings: The hearing on the motion for attorney's fees is continued to July 1, 2015 to be heard simultaneously with the motion to strike or tax costs. The court will consider the late filed reply brief and gives leave to James Bennett and Patricia Gridley to file any sur-reply before June 9, 2015 if they so choose. There will be no hearing on June 3, 2015.
